senses.gloss: to hear of, to hear about

examples.text: فَلَمَّا سَمِعَتْ بِمَكْرِهِنَّ أَرْسَلَتْ إِلَيْهِنَّ وَأَعْتَدَتْ لَهُنَّ مُتَّكَأً وَآتَتْ كُلَّ وَاحِدَةٍ مِّنْهُنَّ سِكِّينًا وَقَالَتِ اخْرُجْ عَلَيْهِنَّ

senses.gloss: to listen to, to pay attention to, to hear someone out
to make hear, to let hear, to give someone something to hear

examples.text: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ غِشَـٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
examples.english: Allah has sealed their hearts and their hearing, and their sight is covered. They will suffer a tremendous punishment.

etymology.text: Inherited from Proto-Semitic *šamaʕ-. Cognate with Hebrew שמע.
